opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.before_state: Stained, pet-hair-covered sectional that guests notice immediately
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, fitted cover that looks like a brand-new sofa with zero pet hair visible
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning season plus peak shedding season for pets drives massive search volume for furniture protection in April.

opportunities.specific_product: Stackable under-sink cabinet organizer with pull-out drawers
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered under-sink with fallen bottles, leaking products, and dead space
opportunities.after_state: Tiered, labeled pull-out organizers with every product visible and accessible
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning drives record bathroom organization searches every April, with this format dominating Reels saves.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper adjustable pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up in pain → best sleep of your life for $89
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed pillow causing neck stiffness and poor sleep every morning
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic, adjustable-fill pillow with zero neck pain and deep restorative sleep
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content is surging in Q2 2026 and high AOV means strong affiliate returns on a 20% commission rate.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia premium silicone cooking utensil set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Melted plastic drawer → chef kitchen for $38
opportunities.before_state: Mismatched, melted, discolored plastic spatulas crammed in an overflowing drawer
opportunities.after_state: Uniform rose-gold silicone set in a clean ceramic holder on a styled countertop
opportunities.why_now: Kitchen aesthetic content spikes in spring as people refresh spaces post-winter, and Syruvia's 20% commission maximizes revenue.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products upholstered accent chair with wood legs
opportunities.transformation_hook: Empty bedroom corner → boutique hotel vibe for $129
opportunities.before_state: Bare, lifeless bedroom corner used as a clothes pile dumping ground
opportunities.after_state: Styled reading nook with accent chair, throw blanket, and floor lamp creating a luxe focal point
